case_title: PETER ROSS et al VS. FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY ROSS, PETER ROSS, ADA COCHAVI AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM: NICOLE CRAIG FILED BY ROSS, PETER FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2012 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSS, PETER ROSS, ADA COCHAVI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY CLAIM DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO PETER ROSS FOR NON-APPEARANCE. FIND FOR DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY AS TO PLAINTIFF AIDA ROSS AS PLAINTIFF DID NOT SHOW IT WAS MORE LIKELY THEN NOT THAT THE DELAY WAS CAUSED BY LOST SUBORDINATION AGREEMENT, NOR THAT THERE WAS A LEGAL DUTY TO PROCESS THE LOAN WITHIN A SET AMOUNT OF TIME. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSS, PETER ROSS, ADA COCHAVI AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-21-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2012 BY NICOLE CRAIG. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY HIS WIFE MRS. AIDA ROSS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: NICOLE CRAIG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ROSS, ADA COCHAVI
